purpose: r11 schema design: ensemble row format for R39 mandate compliance. Single-shot row (r10) → ensemble row (r11) with mean ± stdev + family stability + AN11 axes.
raw_91_caveat: Schema only — no entries yet. r10 13 entries are V_phen_GWT_baseline single-shot (BASE_no_fine_tune) which is acceptable per single-shot definition (model self-baseline, no LoRA stochastic). r11 adds AN11 LoRA-trained ensemble axis ON TOP of r10 baseline.

top1_family_distribution.Hexad: int (count of seeds where Hexad was top-1)

an11_b_cosine.dominant_family: string | null (which family wins majority, null if no majority)

an11_c_jsd.verdict_count_infra_fail: int (vllm boot failures, distinguished from measurement-fail)

ensemble_quality.any_axis_robust: bool (true if any axis has all 5 seeds emit value)
ensemble_quality.single_shot_safe: bool (true if all observed stdev < 0.5 × mean)

migration_from_r10.approach: additive — r10 entries retained as v_phen_gwt_baseline_* fields; an11_ensemble_v1 nested object added per backbone when ensemble dispatched
migration_from_r10.compatibility: r10 readers can still extract baseline; r11 readers gain ensemble fields when present
migration_from_r10.first_target_backbone: mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1 (Fire 6/10 partial data 통합 가능 — N=2 partial ensemble row 등재 후 N≥5로 확장)

n2_partial_entry_proposal.raw_91_caveat: N=2 below R39 mandate threshold (≥5); flagged 'provisional' until 3 more seeds added

forward_use_cases.case_1_single_backbone_ensemble: 5-fire ensemble for new backbone (Mistral / Qwen / Llama / etc.) → registry row with full ensemble metrics
forward_use_cases.case_2_cross_backbone_comparison: ensemble entries for multiple backbones → cross-row comparison of dominant_family + an11_a_robust + v1prime_robust
forward_use_cases.case_3_ablation_study: different config_signature per ensemble (r=16 vs r=64 / 3ep vs 10ep) → config-conditional ensemble metrics
forward_use_cases.case_4_atlas_promotion: ensemble metrics that pass r39_mandate_satisfied → atlas R-candidate evidence backed (e.g., 'Mistral-7B family alignment is X with N=5 ensemble')
